statement.en: OʻZBEKISTONDA YASHIL SUGʻURTA MAHSULOTLARINI RIVOJLANTIRISHNING NAZARIY VA AMALIY ASOSLARI
statement.summary: Ushbu maqolada O‘zbekistonda ESG tamoyillari asosida yashil sug‘urta mahsulotlarini rivojlantirishning nazariy va amaliy asoslari tadqiq etilgan. Tadqiqotda yashil sug‘urta mahsulotlarining mazmuni, ularning sug‘urta bozoridagi o‘rni hamda ekologik va iqlimoiy risklarni boshqarishdagi ahamiyati tahlil qilinadi. Xalqaro tajriba va milliy sharoitlar asosida O‘zbekistonda joriy etilishi mumkin bo‘lgan yashil sug‘urta mahsulotlari turlari va ularning kutilayotgan samaralari aniqlangan. Tadqiqot natijalari yashil sug‘urta mahsulotlarini rivojlantirish sug‘urta bozorining barqarorligi, raqobatbardoshligi va innovatsion rivojlanishini ta’minlashda muhim omil ekanini ko‘rsatadi.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The paper presents provisional applied research on green insurance product development in Uzbekistan based on ESG principles. It analyzes content, market positioning, and risk management applications with forward-looking recommendations. Classification as FLOWING reflects: (1) empirical/prescriptive nature requiring field validation, (2) policy-dependent conclusions tied to Uzbekistan's regulatory environment, (3) preprint status (dated 2026, future timestamp suggests provisional framework), (4) lack of peer-reviewed publication evidence in abstract metadata.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 緑色保険が環境リスクを吸収するほど、市場の回復力が増す神秘的な調和。
